역대하 11:1.content: When Rehoboam had come to Jerusalem, he assembled the house of Judah and Benjamin, one hundred eighty thousand chosen men who were warriors, to fight against Israel, to bring the kingdom again to Rehoboam.

역대하 11:2.content: But Yahweh’s word came to Shemaiah the man of God, saying,

역대하 11:3.content: “Speak to Rehoboam the son of Solomon, king of Judah, and to all Israel in Judah and Benjamin, saying,

역대하 11:4.content: ‘Yahweh says, “You shall not go up, nor fight against your brothers! Every man return to his house; for this thing is of me.” ’ ” So they listened to Yahweh’s words, and returned from going against Jeroboam.

역대하 11:5.content: Rehoboam lived in Jerusalem, and built cities for defense in Judah.

역대하 11:10.content: Zorah, Aijalon, and Hebron, which are fortified cities in Judah and in Benjamin.

역대하 11:11.content: He fortified the strongholds, and put captains in them, and stores of food, oil and wine.

역대하 11:12.content: He put shields and spears in every city, and made them exceedingly strong. Judah and Benjamin belonged to him.

역대하 11:13.content: The priests and the Levites who were in all Israel stood with him out of all their territory.

역대하 11:14.content: For the Levites left their pasture lands and their possession, and came to Judah and Jerusalem; for Jeroboam and his sons cast them off, that they should not execute the priest’s office to Yahweh.

역대하 11:15.content: He himself appointed priests for the high places, for the male goats, and for the calves which he had made.

역대하 11:16.content: After them, out of all the tribes of Israel, those who set their hearts to seek Yahweh, the God of Israel, came to Jerusalem to sacrifice to Yahweh, the God of their fathers.

역대하 11:17.content: So they strengthened the kingdom of Judah, and made Rehoboam the son of Solomon strong for three years; for they walked three years in the way of David and Solomon.

역대하 11:18.content: Rehoboam took a wife for himself, Mahalath the daughter of Jerimoth the son of David and of Abihail the daughter of Eliab the son of Jesse.

역대하 11:19.content: She bore him sons: Jeush, Shemariah, and Zaham.

역대하 11:20.content: After her, he took Maacah the daughter of Absalom; and she bore him Abijah, Attai, Ziza, and Shelomith.

역대하 11:21.content: Rehoboam loved Maacah the daughter of Absalom above all his wives and his concubines; for he took eighteen wives and sixty concubines, and became the father of twenty-eight sons and sixty daughters.

역대하 11:22.content: Rehoboam appointed Abijah the son of Maacah to be chief, the prince among his brothers; for he intended to make him king.

역대하 11:23.content: He dealt wisely, and dispersed of all his sons throughout all the lands of Judah and Benjamin, to every fortified city. He gave them food in abundance and he sought many wives for them.
